# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for our legacy Python 2.7 application. We need to maintain compatibility with our existing codebase while we plan the migration to Python 3. Use an older base image that supports Python 2.7 and our legacy dependencies.
# Category: container_security

FROM python:2.7.18-slim-buster

ENV PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 \
    PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 \
    PIP_NO_CACHE_DIR=1 \
    PIP_DISABLE_PIP_VERSION_CHECK=1

WORKDIR /app

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        build-essential \
        libpq-dev \
        git \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

COPY requirements.txt /app/

RUN pip install --upgrade pip==20.3.4 setuptools==44.1.1 wheel==0.37.1 \
    && pip install -r requirements.txt

COPY . /app

CMD ["python", "app.py"]
